specs.title: cp-000: Design amber
cp-001: Audience Fit red
cp-002: Up to 5 suggestions displayed sorted by priority
cp-003: Priority coloring high red medium yellow low green
cp-004: Each suggestion shows actionable text
cp-005: Per-slide breakdown with slide number and title
cp-006: Issues list red
cp-007: Strengths list green
cp-008: Click a slide insight to navigate to that slide
cp-009: Re-evaluate button to refresh scores after changes
cp-010: Endpoint apipresentationscoach
cp-011: Sends deckId audienceType all slides data
cp-012: Returns overallScore 5 dimension scores suggestions slideInsights
cp-013: Opens from filmstrip right-click Regenerate with AI
cp-014: Also available as Regenerate Selected Slides for multi-select
cp-015: Dialog UI
cp-016: Title shows Regenerate This Slide or Regenerate Selected Slides
cp-017: Lists slide titles being regenerated
cp-018: Instruction text input freeform prompt
cp-019: Tone selector RegenerateTone enum
cp-020: Regenerate submit button
cp-021: Closecancel button
cp-022: On submit regenerates slide content via store action

cp-024: Three-panel layout when slides exist
cp-025: Left Card Outline Sidebar w-56
cp-026: Center Card Stack flex-1 scrollable
cp-027: Right AI Agent Panel w-360 conditional on agentPanelOpen

cp-029: Gamma Toolbar at top fixed
